# Post-deploy smoke gate URL list for datanika.io (landing).
# Format: path|content-type-substring|body-substring-or-empty
# Source of truth: plans/growth/SMOKE_URLS.md (Growth-owned).
# Sync from there on change; ping Infra in landing#147 on edits.
#
# DEVIATIONS from SMOKE_URLS.md (flagged to Growth for SoT update):
#   1. All landing paths require trailing slash (Astro build.format: directory).
#      Without the slash, landing serves 301 redirects, not 200.
#   2. Sitemap is served at /sitemap-index.xml (astrojs/sitemap default), not
#      /sitemap.xml. The latter 404s.
#   3. /llms.txt is INTENTIONALLY MISSING until the courtesy mirror on
#      datanika.io ships. Tracked in landing#147.
/|text/html|
/ai-agents/|text/html|/llms.txt
/docs/ai-agents/|text/html|app.datanika.io/llms.txt
/blog/ai-agent-native/|text/html|
/templates/stripe-to-postgres/|text/html|
/pricing/|text/html|$79
/pricing/|text/html|$0.50/GB
/pricing/|text/html|$0.25/GB
/why-cheaper/|text/html|$0.50/GB
/features/volume-pricing/|text/html|
/blog/pricing-v2-math-and-why/|text/html|
/docs/getting-started/|text/html|
/compare/airbyte/|text/html|
/compare/fivetran/|text/html|
/compare/stitch/|text/html|
/compare/hevo/|text/html|
/sitemap-index.xml|xml|
